queries.question: Show all central banks and commercial banks either of which operate in the USA.
queries.sql:
SELECT Central_Bank.central_bank_name AS bank_name
FROM Country JOIN Central_Bank ON Country.id = Central_Bank.country_id
WHERE Country.name = "USA"
UNION
SELECT Commercial_Bank.commercial_bank_name AS bank_name
FROM Country JOIN Commercial_Bank ON Country.id = Commercial_Bank.country_id
WHERE Country.name = "USA"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?o0 WHERE {
  {
    ?country a :Country .
    ?central_bank a :Central_Bank .
    ?central_bank p:hasCountry ?country .
    ?central_bank p:central_bank_name ?central_bank_name .
    ?country p:name ?name_f .
    FILTER(STR(?name_f) = "USA")
    BIND(?central_bank_name AS ?o0)
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?country a :Country .
    ?commercial_bank a :Commercial_Bank .
    ?commercial_bank p:hasCountry ?country .
    ?commercial_bank p:commercial_bank_name ?commercial_bank_name .
    ?country p:name ?name_f .
    FILTER(STR(?name_f) = "USA")
    BIND(?commercial_bank_name AS ?o0)
  }
}

queries.question: List all central banks and commercial banks that operate in the USA.
queries.sql:
SELECT Central_Bank.central_bank_name AS bank_name
FROM Country JOIN Central_Bank ON Country.id = Central_Bank.country_id
UNION
SELECT Commercial_Bank.commercial_bank_name AS bank_name
FROM Country JOIN Commercial_Bank ON Country.id = Commercial_Bank.country_id
WHERE Country.name = "USA"

ambiguous_dsl.question: List all central banks and commercial banks that operate in the USA.
